channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 180 replies — 720.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 180 • Updated: 2026-03-11 19:00 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967705
>>61965995
nope, that's upper class. cope

61967708
>>61965964
lmao this faggot really lost an argument and came crying to biz

61967711
>>61966297
>I am from India

61967731
I make $125k before taxes right now. Is that a lot? I always assumed I was a little underpaid since I don't ask for raises or job hop.

61967743
>>61967731
Gross? It's alright. Net? Bretti gud. Equivalent to making 62k twenty years ago. High end of lower middle class.

61967992
>>61965995
I do all that on 40k tho
COL is the only thing that matters

61968004
>>61967215
If you own a home with no debt and you live in an area with low COL, you can save 25-35% of your income for anything you want. You can easily do this on blue collar income.

Cityniggers are the true poors.

61968115
>>61968004
City people that can afford it are not poor,ruralfag

61968117
>>61968004
Lemme guess, your home cost 50k

61968118
>>61967992
You’re fucking retarded.

61968164
>>61966297
Man it's you back again. You've always said previously you're a NEET and your brother is rich and pays for your life. But it can't be much of a life if you waste it baiting people on biz who weren't born at the finish line.

61968189
>>61968164
What are you talking about?

61968190
>>61965964
ocpd namenigger thread.

61968199
>>61968189
Don't play dumb, you didn't earn your wealth

61968202
>>61965964
imagine 125k in yuropoor is like boss level

61968224
>>61968199
> you didn't earn your wealth
Things poor people say.

61968227
>>61968164
> who weren't born at the finish line.
Everyone, when you add their parents and grandparents, had 100 years to make. All the high iq people made it

61968231
>>61968202
But the jobs are even rarer and your work load higher

61968235
Bloomberg literally right now said
>middle income are starting to join the lower income in feeling the pain of rising prices.

61968302
Class is not derived from monthly income level. If you think it is, that's a giveaway that you're working class.

Middle class people own their home outright, no debts, and don't have to worry about work. IE if they lose their job, they could support themselves for at least a full year without incurring a hit to their standard of living, or getting into turmoil.

Middle class people can work fun jobs for low income, and still live middle class lives, because they have their home paid off. Higher middle class will own stocks that provide a stable income for themselves as well as their home.

If you have to work for a living, you are working class. Regardless of what your takehome is.

If not going to work means you lose your home, you're definitely not middle class.

61968307
>too stupid to understand cost of living
Sorry for the people conversing with you

61969189
>>61967708
They're doing that a lot lately
Apparently 4chins is personalstreetshitterblog central
The really sad thing is the post volume this bait generates. Look at these post numbers!
sage for off topic shit thread

61969890
>>61968302
MIDDLE CLASS, the bottom 70%, has no savings.
>>61969189
The topic is good for debating. Everyone has their own definition of middle class. Fuck off.

61969976
>>61968302
>Middle class people own their home outright, no debts, and don't have to worry about work.
seems like a pretty naive view of credit

in my experience wealthy people use credit as much or more than the less rich. Going into debt is probably necessary to becoming wealthy, and even after you're rich it's still better to risk the bank's money than your own for most stuff.

also again, Buy Borrow Die implies using debt to avoid taxes. And it's nearly universal

It is fun to read how angery 4chan users get about debt though. I've never met a wealthy person that won't borrow money. But 4chan thinks having debt is somehow bad, or a sign of failure.

61970001
>>61969976
You’re an old pos living in some ruralfag area.

61970023
>>61969890
>overly taxonomizing petty subclasses is good debate
Wew lad
>>61970001
>good debate

No matter how hard life gets for me, at least I'll never be this clueless, classless, or crude. God damn it feels good having a soul. I'm taking all of your izzat and going home. Come at me ((You) can't, and (You) shan't)

61970145
>>61966005
>2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha
You can live under 30 min from Omaha for cheap in 100% white towns.
>t. bought a house 30 min from 72nd street and I-80 on $24/hour in 2018

61970160
>>61970145
> You can live under 30 min from Omaha for cheap in 100% white towns.
aka lower class areas.

61970170
>>61970145
The entire discussion was about how people that struggle in the big city should move out the city. Then here you are moving out the city because you cannot afford it. Do people have 0 self awareness?

61970185
>>61967097
> 95/100 times someone who owns a million dollar house is upper class.
Not in big cities or any city that is well known. 1m would be considered ghetto and low class.

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 90 replies — 360.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 90 • Updated: 2026-03-11 18:55 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968088
>>61965041
kek

61968094
>>61966508
do you think he poured hot chocolate on his chinese wife, as a "fuck you" to swift?

61968216
>>61964199
Price

61968298
>>61965461
we're pretty close. xStocks is the tech Kraken will be using to tokenize normal stocks from nasdaq, after nasdaq has entered partnership with them
Now guess what, 2025

>https://backed.fi/news-updates/xstocks-are-going-live-tokenized-stocks-for-the-defi-era

another one here:

OKX got a $25b buyout from NYSE mother company intercontinental exchange as strategic partnership.

Now guess what:

X Layer, the official eth L2 from OKX joined chainlink scale program in 2025. Basically, they agree to use chainlinks services for their stack for free usage of those services (CCIP, functions, automations, price feeds)

>https://web3.okx.com/learn/chainlink-xlayer

Not to mention chainlinks direct partnerships of publishing trade data of IC and NYSE.

Now look further. Competitors start using the same tools (Chainlink) because if you don't you get left behind, the biggest dex on solana adopts chainlink as their official oracle service for their upcoming prediction market, while polymarket has also adopted chainlink as official oracle service already months ago.

61968311
>>61968298
news like these will keep coming and before you know it, everything loops back to chainlink in some way.

I'm not saying ever service will use the FULL stack of services chainlink provides. Some might only use the price feeds.

others might only use functions or ccip

What matters is that chainlink put itself in a position, where most companies will adopt it out of principle. Imagine you want to spin up a company that wants to have the edge in one of those things (interoperability, speed, etc) but you have to sacrifice other things because you can't be the best in everything. So you fallback on using a proven company (chainlink) for the rest, it reduces complexity and you can focus on your own niche. Win win for everyone

61968320
>>61965559
This needs to be updated to swift runs endless pocs, never charges a fee and staking doesn't happen.
>$8

61968327
>>61968298
>>61968311
>Ctrl+f "LINK token functionality in all this technobabble
>0 results
can we finally ban linkjeets

61968340
So when will Chainlink become a publically traded company people can invest in?

61968358
>>61968340
CL employees have officially stated that there is no IPO happening, buy LINK token

61968601
>>61968340
they get equity in link token

61968616
>>61964682
how the fuck does swift even make money it feels like the biggest vaporwave company to ever exist..a big paper tiger.

61968817
>>61964199

saw some homeless guy ranting about this yesterday
he was crawling down the sidewalk trying to pickup food for his cult master, but wasn't making much progress, as he was using up all his energy yelling about these "partnerships"

i guess that goes to show you kids....cuckoldry does NOT pay


THE Cuckolds of crypto

61968828
>>61965559
>Swift going live.

wait i thought it went "live" in november of last year?

>>61965423
and worst of all, even in 10 years, none of that shit involves link funding token. it will be gone by then, mark my words

61968875
>>61964278
>look at all the XRP retards in the comments


here's the exact part on the chart where link boyscouts finally broke and went full psycho against xrp

this was the summer of last year ('25) when xrp ran up to mid $3's while link barely budged


you see, link, just like its holders, is so weak and limp, that even the entire market pumping can barely move it. it's like trying to drag a 400 pound dead body

it's funny to see a coin price mimic the physicality of its holders. art imitating life if you will

61968895
>>61968358
>CL employees have officially stated that there is no IPO happening

posts like these are great. they truly show how incredibly naive and inexperienced a link boyscout is

>duuuuuuude the janitor at the building i work at said the owner isn't selling

as if any of these conversations would involve a 26 yr old trans "god" who's job it is to copy and paste buzzwords on x

61968914
>>61968875
didnt read your slop lol Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

61968946
>>61968616
>how the fuck does swift even make money

swift's purpose is not to make money. it's a co-op

they do collect some annual fees from the member banks to facilitate operations. they are not aiming to generate a profit, and they aren't taking a cut of cross border transactions if that's what you're thinking


not for nothing bro but you could've had answer to your q in like 15 seconds w ai search

61968951
>>61968914
>Whatever you wrote still doesnt justify the XRP spammers being clinically retarded

the funny part is you are the exact same as them

in your head your ego is telling you that you're a secret genius while the xrp cult just doesn't "get it". but the reality is they just went 7x last year while you made nothing

your ego is saving you from the brutal reality

61969258
>>61968951
so which one are you

61969267
>literal retard brown mentally ill gooners are making more money than you
feels bad man
but pain is temporary, glory is eternal! WAGMI MARINES

61969348
>>61964199
It's amazing the lack of interest in LINK. It's get the best news and doesn't move at all. In 2019 this news would have pumped it to $100.

61969656
>>61968951
>the funny part is you are the exact same as them

Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story. Token price doesnt matter here. Youre hung up on it only because it’s the only way you can downplay the fact that Chainlink got mentioned while XRP didnt lol. And just because link didn’t pump doesnt change the fact that Swift mentioned Chainlink.

61969683
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
yup

61969746
>>61965107
Take your delusional ramblings back to /pol/ you fuckin freak

61969776
>>61967953
no, it's a guy with severe mental illness who has been posting the same image occasionally in link threads for many years. he's probably been extremely blown the fuck out on whatever else he put his money into and can only get satisfaction by making fun of stinkies, because he didn't buyed when it was below a dollar

61969981
>>61969656
>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story.

and? bro you're cheering on an offshore company that you own zero equity in just like a sportsball fan

then you had to project me as some big xrp holder. i fucking wish. i actually bought the line that it was dead and didn't buy any this cycle

they used to say to always inverse biz, i should've listened

61969992
>>61969683
>>Chainlink was mentioned, XRP wasnt, end of story
>yup

you meant to say chainlink labs i believe


this doesn't help the funding token tho kid. you guys keep trying these marketing strategies that haven't worked for 5 years straight.

i take it you've never read what einstein had to say on repeating the same thing over and over

61970155
>>61969981
>and?
I didnt read anything you wrote except the first word.

61970161
>>61964199
>but chainlink was MENTIONED in the swift files

61970163
>>61964199
It's over bros, LINK is not new tech, a hidden gem, or a coming 10-100x. LINK is mainstream and is in Twitter roasties bios. It’s a corporate entity now, so Sergey has to dump another 750k LINK to hire talent managers and diversity officers. LINK hasn’t been the biz token for over 5 years now. Just sell anons... i-i-iit’s over. It was a good ride marines.

item.title: POOL'S CLOSED — 40 replies — 160.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
POOL'S CLOSED

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-03-11 19:05 UTC

OP

POOL'S CLOSED

Early replies (first 3)

61967844
Doesn't matter, oil has been diverted.
Lol oil baggie

61967846
>oil dumps to $60 anyway
this is a nothingburger buy the shit and piss 500 dip and enjoy a 3x by next year

61967882
Inshallah someone will buy my bags now.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968111
>>61968095
SHOULD HAVE BOUGHT THE DIP
https://oilprice.com/

61968142
>>61968095
Yeah the market caught the bluff of Trump but i think the fair value is 100 at the moment.

61969228
>>61967895
Gnarly

61969255
>>61967838
I just love politics, Trump made a shitpost saying just cross the strait and people died.
Everyone who believes any of his words deserves the same fate and I hope way more die the same way.

61969265
>>61969255
someone died?

where are you seeing that someone died?

61969278
>>61969265
3 ships hit. 2 people killed. All to satisfy the whims of an orange retard

61969303
>>61969278
not sure, but Iran attacking everyone is the very best possible outcome for trump. It makes him look right and them look stupid and dangerous.

61969314
>>61967838
already priced in. sorry, ya thought it'll be your get-rich-quick ticket?

61969317
>>61969303
Yes I'm sure zogbot in chief looks stellar in his vassal's war of aggression.

61969332
>>61969265
>>61969303
You deserve to die too. I hope your death is as stupid as the ones that died in the OP.

61969346
>>61969317
>>61969332
nobody likes iran

nobody cares if they get attacked. They have zero friends that aren't suicidal religious fanatics

61969352
>>61969346
I'm not fond of Iran, but in your small burger brain if I'm not in the side of united states, i'm with Iran.
Just kill yourself at this point.

61969368
*yawn*
destroy everything already or fuck off

61969374
>>61969352
>everyone that disagrees with ME must die!
ok
that's pretty much iran's mistake.

they could sit back and look like the victims and people would feel bad for them

or they can attack everyone and guarantee nobody supports them. Just like you, they're not smart enough to sway anyone's opinion.

61969425
>>61969374
>or they can attack everyone and guarantee nobody supports them.
Except Israel does exactly that and they are one of the most successful countries. Look into the Samson Option.

61969431
>>61969425
>Samson Option
People still believe that’s a thing?

61969440
This tiny strip of land is the reason why ships have to go around Ash Shishah. Hilariously this would be a safer route if it were an island. A peninsula with no road because of steep mountains. Just a dead end hiking trail to to it. The only way to get there is by boat.

61969445
>>61969425
israel claims to be attacked with model rockets every day. I don't know if it's true or not, but the average reader probably believes it and doesn't mind them responding even when it's clearly disproportionate.

>weakling picks fights with the big guy and gets his ass kicked
>tries to play victim
>nobody falls for it

israel might be unpopular but islamic republics are way less popular

61969468
>>61969374
>feel bad about them
Wow, that sure helps.
Also, nobody actually cares that the Gulf monarchies are getting hit, they are disgusting. Except, of course, oil/gas wise.

61969481
>>61969445
Only americans and indians categorically hate muslims because they've eaten at the propaganda slop trough their whole lives.

61969487
>>61967838
>kill current leader trying to cause a regime change with a revolution and attack iran's oil refineries
>act surprised when people don't rise, the new leader is mad because you killed their family and they don't gain anything for stopping the war since you destroyed their refineries
Honestly, jews should have seen this one coming, but they needed their blood sacrifice for Purim i guess

61969511
>>61969481
only a muslim would fail to differentiate between the republic and the religion

>oh they unfairly hate muslims!
>we're the victims here!

no, we hate your government. It is evil. And you're evil for supporting it. Regardless of your religion.

61970002
>>61967838
Schronigger's pool

61970038
>>61969314
It’s not priced in, boomers and zionists are emotionally tied to Iran being a weak country and this being a nothing burger. It’s like how the Indians on this board are emotionally tied to their shitcoins making them billionaires.

61970064
>>61969481

It just doesn't sound appealing. White men like a healthy amount of freedom to do their own thing. We can see Islam is forced homogenization and a sort of dictatorial system with little wiggle room.

61970073
>>61969440
>just a dead end hiking trail leading to it
Oh damn... sigh... time to add another place to the (way too long) hiking vacation wishlist.

61970079
>>61967838

61970114
>>61967838

61970131
>not my problem
>不是我的问题

61970207
>>61970131
They have the mandate of heaven.

item.title: ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers >why does every job want “experience” for entry level >I applied twice the market is cooke… — 29 replies — 116.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers >why does every job want “experience” for entry level >I applied twice the market is cooke…

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-03-11 19:06 UTC

OP

ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers

>why does every job want “experience” for entry level
>I applied twice the market is cooked
>budgeting is basically poverty mindset
>my boss asked me to come in before noon
>why should I save if housing is unfair
>trades are scary I’m more of an ideas person
>I deserve six figures for surviving the economy
>compounding takes too long I need results now
>retirement is a scam I plan to go viral
>someone fix the system I’m exhausted

Early replies (first 3)

61960323
>NOOO i got drafted by Trumpstein

61960451
I’d rather pretend I’m a Millennial
>OMG guys it’s exactly like ‘08
>you know 40 is the new 30
>Im only 35! 35 is young!!!
>Fucking boomers won’t retire en mass, fucking assholes!
>my cat is a heckin CHONKER
>No I don’t want kids my doggo is enough
>we need taxes causes roads dude
>I hate roads and cars I wished the US was like Europe!
>I can’t buy a house because boomers refuse to sell to me at what I can afford

61960546
>>61960451
Bootyblasted zoomer detected

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61961342
The level of pimples on his fade is great
good shit OP was not a faggot...

too bad he posted all those other threads in his lifetime...

61962407
>>61960451
>>Im only 35! 35 is young!!!
The oldest zoomers are like 29 kek

61962410
>>61960451
i ironically say "heckin" in my workplace Slack sometimes but people think it is unironic :(

61962417
>>61960109
fr fr
Doctors are the losers of the adult world -- I am going to be a famous video game streamer and YouTube Instagram influencer. $680k a year is minimum to live a middle class lifestyle bruh no capitals.

61962420
I would rather pretend I'm a boomer
>GAAAAAAAH I'm having a heart attack
>Son, what are you doing lingering in the corner with a pillow like that?
>There were only 500,000 of these corvettes made!

61962431
>>61960451
>You're over there adulting
>You haven't even had your coffee yet

61962443
>>61960451
bro that's just reddit
the cool millenials use X now

61962453
>>61960451

shaking and crying typing this

61962500
>>61960109
>>why does every job want “experience” for entry level
Why do the low paying, most basic jobs need experience though?
Also
>>my boss asked me to come in before noon
Valid complaint
>>trades are scary I’m more of an ideas person
A lot of zoomers ARE turning blue collar
>>someone fix the system I’m exhausted
Everyone left or right in America are saying this except for billionaires
I'm not even american so you calling me dumb names doesn't even work

61962532
>>61962500
Because if you've never worked there is a 40% chance you can't show up on time day after day and will just crash out.

61962541
>>61960109
kek i literally got my current job with the boomer strategy
just walked in shook his hand and asked for a job

61962595
We shouldn't be making fun of the younger generations, we should be bringing them up.

61962598
>>61962595
Exact logic of the participation trophy-era btw

61962603
>>61962595
We should be b a n g i n g them ;)

61963065
why is he crying cum tears?

61963472
>>61960451
>t. buttmad zoomie
Enjoy the desert soon zoomer, house market will crash and jobs market will recover as soon as WWIII shorts the beta-blocker supply and zoomer population.

61967948
>>61962417
most doctors are utterly clueless or downright dangerous/malicious and dont deserve their positions

61969084
>>61960451
Sounds more fun than the average zoomie loser

61970020
>>61967948
That's racist

61970056
im a zoomer its like this

>Gegg all the people older than me are retards
>Geg its all falling apart soon we can rebuild the new world from the ashes
>>61960109
>>61960323
>>61960451
>>61960546

61970061
Christian Anarchism - No King But Christ

61970084
>>61960451
SHUT UP

61970115
>>61970084
board full of millenials not only going poor from bitstein crashing to 0, but crashing out in response to obvious bait

61970178
>>61970115
It is zoomers that are heavily into crypto because they cannot afford homes.

61970182
>>61960451
Yes.

61970213
>>61960451
lmao at the replies, millenials are truly the weakest generation

item.title: Why is LINK over [insert local whole dollar value resistance] the most reliable BTC DOWN indicator ever? — 13 replies — 52.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why is LINK over [insert local whole dollar value resistance] the most reliable BTC DOWN indicator ever?

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-11 19:04 UTC

OP

Why is LINK over [insert local whole dollar value resistance] the most reliable BTC DOWN indicator ever? It might be the most reliable trading market indicator ever. It has well above a 90% strike rate. I have made good money on it but i am afraid to go balls deep because it seems too stupid.

Early replies (first 3)

61968222
>>61968207
Because BTC is Chainlink price control coin

61968239
>>61968222
Checked. But really? That seems absurd. Its got to be so much harder to move the price of BTC than than it would be to just manipulate LINK directly. I need specifics

61968256
>>61968239
By using BTC to suppress the price they can actually accumulate LINK while keeping the price low

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968297
>>61968256
They could accumulate LINK by manipulating only LINK too

61968410
>>61968207
If I wasn't such a cowardly retard I would have made it off this by now

61968483
>>61968239
BTC is a dead chain walking.
Everyone knows this since the 2017 hardfork where the banker backed developers took over
Neutered on purpose
Kept alive to keep the space in control. EG keep enough hashpower to stop original bitcoin from respawning
Or suppressing an oracle system that replaces bank's custody and control with trustless, distributed protocols

>That seems absurd
Haven't you gotten the memo yet? Blood sorcerers rule the world.

61968584
I appreciate the input anons, but where are all the fudders? I would like to hear their take on this

61968625
>>61968584
FUD?
Reread my post >>61968483
The banking clans have declared legitimate crypto to be a threat to their control.
Instead of trying to kill it (futile), they have flooded the space with bullshit and scams and wield their imaginary capital to crush anything that is vital and true.

Chainlink will not prosper until the banking houses are ground to dust. Victory is not guaranteed

61968717
>>61968625
So i can continue to just make money shorting BTC forever with no consequences?

61968766
>>61968717
Hypothetically speaking, if it is bank suppression, this means you could just steal money from the banks by shorting BTC, throwing that profit into LINK, rinse and repeat. If they aren’t watching closely and you had a large amount of capital(enough to move the market) you could steal A LOT of money from them.

61968927
>>61968297
no because theyd have to sell it to keep the price down to do that. This explains why huge whale accumulation takes place without the price ever going up.

61969989
Why link fudders refuse to touch this thread? They post in every other link thread almost instantly

61970202
>>61969989
its apparent now that link fudders were right all along,no use for the link token, everything was priced in.super linear staking was a scam. chainlinks only real use case is to power gambling addicts on decentralized online casinos. there is no need to fud link anymore. slowly they are moving on. even when rwa's go mainstream there is no reason for the price to go up.
fudders will be back when this coin hits 12 dollars again, it should hit 15-17 dollars in the next bull run.


anyone who bought this coin the the last 5 years is dissapointed.

item.title: So, we're supposed to be happy with a 2x now? — 8 replies — 30.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, we're supposed to be happy with a 2x now?

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-11 18:54 UTC

OP

> just buy buttcorn bro
> be happy with a 2x bro
> DON'T BUY ALTS BRO THEY'RE DEAD BRO IT'S ALL ABOUT AI NOW BRO
> buy ai stocks near the literal bubble burst
> can't flock to precious metals because manipulated horseshit once again

What has crypto come to?! I fucking miss 5-10x's being handed out like candy. Getting even a 2x is a fucking K2 climb now with a strong chance of frostbite death.

Just fuck everything.

Early replies (first 3)

61969931
>>61969930
>oh no I can only double my money waaah
this is what you sound like

61969939
most of the altcoin traders moved to prediction markets

61969951
>>61969939
Which is, again, pure manipulated house always wins horseshit.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61969954
>>61969931
Like I said in my OP, even getting to that 2x is like trying to ascend K2 in the fucking winter. An unbelievable struggle with a strong chance of death.

61969977
>>61969954
Do you honestly think most of the top coins aren't at least touching their ATHs again next pump? Take your pick of 2x's, 2.5x's, 3x's. Fire and forget. Stop being a baby.

61970130
>>61969977
checked truth poster

61970139
>>61969954
Thats also a 2X over like 5 years.
Fags.

61970153
>>61969930

item.title: I bought some $PEPE — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I bought some $PEPE

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-11 19:08 UTC

OP

I don't usually invest in memecoins but outside of crypto Pepe as a meme is the og political meme, period. It's the one that started it all.
The tokenomics are good, no inflation.
#2 on ETH after Shiba.
Shiba is just a temu dogecoin, nobody cares. Pepe is the true memecoin.

Early replies (first 3)

61967709
>>61967706
Better yet get SPX

61967797
>>61967706
good luck anon

honeslty thinking of just throwing my money into memes at this point and hoping they revisit their ATH

would rather try and hit a 10x with a meme coin than put my money in BTC at this point

61967851
>>61967797
I’m doing the same. Later this year i’m only buying memes with $10K and letting it ride to 0 or 100x. Then walking away from this failure of a technology for ever

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967940
For me it’s BONK. The coin burns every few hours, you can stake it too even . Also cheaper tx fees on solana make it cheap to stake with too
>https://solscan.io/tx/2Pye71t5weeuy3Nmpj8uPwFywfzJ7RKiWHYmNkrkH2CcTMTrxd2B9Sv8JsYZzbr4J99wh9f8VUvcZaqM8sg36ZQJ
$570 BONK burn
>https://solscan.io/tx/VKFHK7Mpqikesao2HKHg4Rskfm2hnCGKEywyi5noxmJPVGGFpw3kK25ksFbW4o6dGW32cw2dztEd5gFS4BoFEoz
$1800 BONK burn

61968105
>>61967706
>Pepe as a meme is the og political meme
Exactly why i wont touch it. Half the voters will 100% fade this shit coin. Even doge or shib are better buys right now.

61970219
>>61968105
>Exactly why i wont touch it. Half the voters will 100% fade this shit coin. Even doge or shib are better buys right now.
YOU'RE WRONG. The midterms are coming, and political memecoins will shine. Pepe used to be only a right wing meme but it was also adopted by the left.

61958149
>>61956054
How is it possible for someone to be so brazenly incorrect about concrete historical facts? Is American media just feeding the cattle literal fake news at this point?

61958261
>>61954004
Why does he write like an absolute retard, can Americans explain this to me?

61958269
>>61956866
Sorry, brother, teenage love is the only true form of romantic love. Once you hit that age when the first question a female asks you is "what is your profession, it's over :)

61958280
Can't we gang up to wipe out israel and live in peace with islamist?

61958799
>>61957320
Republicans don't care about fiscal responsibility or prices being low, or anything else really. They just want someone to get up on the podium and be a mirror to their ideology, regardless of what the actual outcome is

61958816
>>61957454
This. It's all fake and gay. Israel literally owns Hollywood

61958832
>>61957296
China just has to do literally nothing in order to win against the US. Ideal world they continue to invest in renewables and infrastructure to help then rebound from global currency meltdowns, and subsequently would give them some isolation from oil price volatility as well. The US is having the equivalent of a brain hemmhorage, it's not long until all executive function is completely dissolved

61958966
>>61957296
>retarded leadership
more like retarded citizens
burgers are fucking golems who can't be trusted and will make this mistake again in the future

61959102
>>61954004
Thankfully, i am currently driving a company issued vehicle and fuel card for most of my driving.

61959300
>>61954140
Everyone knew it would happen. Bibi didn't give a fuck and gave Trump the order anyway

61960740
>>61956276
It was a nothingburger. You forget about the heartbreak and opportunity cost. Benefits did not outweigh the negative consequences at all.

61960852
>>61954004
Having no more Islamic Republic is good for America and for the world.

61960960
>>61958261
>Why does he write like an absolute retard, can Americans explain this to me?
DJT doesn't speak english. He speaks english words, but not grammar, syntax, or meaning.

he spouts vague chain of consciousness word salad, which other people are free to interpret according to their own epistemic lens. This makes him everyone to everybody, and also results in success usually since smarter people than him take his nonsense and filter it into actionable concepts that yield results.

as to whether or not he's actually retarded, we will never know. He doesn't speak english, so it's impossible to judge his intellect. Though the simple failure to learn language is itself a strong sign of retardation. So It's likely he speaks like a retard simply because he is a retard.

61961091
>>61960852

61961113
>>61961091
To be quite honest, I don't want Islam just as I don't want Judaism, or Christianity. I want people who outgrew this madness - brains. Not beliefs.

61962279
>>61961113
>I want people who outgrew this madness - brains. Not beliefs.
Your tone indicates you believe in the dollar, so no sincerity from you.

61964449
How many of you stupid motherfuckers bought oil? HAHAHAHAHAHHAHA.

61964498

61964509
>>61954140

61964526

61964812

61969335

61969400
>>61969383
you guys, I own 7 computer codes that I need to sell above $96,000 each to make my exit. I need you guys to pull together and pump the price up. Don't worry, you'll get to make your exits at some point in the future. we all know how this works, so don't play dumb. I did my part and now it's you guy's turn.

61969406
we have been in bear market for years now

Bull is starting

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61969409
>>61969387
yeah, it's like she gets a runner's high mid struggling and her facial expression tells she just want to be penetrated right there and now with all her soul. Anyways, I think we're in a bear market

>>61969530

We've got neetbux spammers, boboposting spammers (I assume because bobos brown skin is relatable), that one deranged psycho spammer that tells everyone they need to play their last nyt sudoku, and other assorted soulless golems, all of which are 3rd world in either physical or spiritual embodiment.
You cant really engage anymore, and I'm taking that as my information for a bottom signal

61969648

61969779

61969892

item.title: WFH CHADS REPORT IN — 92 replies — 50.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
WFH CHADS REPORT IN

Open thread • Replies: 92 • Updated: 2026-03-11 17:21 UTC

OP

Let's all laugh at the wagies who have to pay insane amounts for gas to get to work kek

Early replies (first 3)

61953886
>>61953855
Imagine spending half your days pay worth of money just to get to work and back lmao

61954053
>>61953855
antisemitic wfh antizog antimiga chads will inherit the earth

61954077
>>61953886
>half
You mean full for minimum wage chads, don’t forget about rent and bills too.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61961897
Implying I don’t dare evade the metro

61962326
>>61960341
im at 120k + benefits and its awesome, can't imagine how nice 250k/year is

what are you investing in?

61962422
>>61959577
The main purpose of female employment is to prevent them from having babies.

61963454
Has anyone here got a WFH in 2025/6? Most seem to be hybrid with full office required during probation

61963700
>>61963454
Yea I snagged a WFH bank job doing cybersecurity end of 2025. Technically we all work at the office but managers tell their teams where to work and my boomer manager is lazy and won't go to the office basically ever so neither does anyone else on his team.

61963769
Anyone else ride an e-bike?

61964574
I have been WFH for two years. For a long time I was playing tons of video games and working maybe 5 hours per week, kek. Now there's a lot more work to do though, but I still only work maybe 20 hours per week on average. The first half of every day I dedicate to reading news, drinking coffee and shitting. I actually feel bad about it as I want to do meaningful work but since we live in clown world I don't care. I was actually the highest performer by far in previous shit jobs like callcenters.

61965044
>>61954585
Came here to post this.

61965065
>>61954976
I just hired someone (WFH) from LinkedIn, I made a post asking for particular skills and he saw it and had a job the next week.
All social media is cancer but LinkedIn does improve work prospects unfortunately.

61965110
>>61964574
I've been WFH for seven years now, a non-coding job watching over a SAAS application. Most days I just fuck around but for example this week I have lots of work. So I fucked around all morning, did nothing during work hours, but now I am bored so I am gonna put in around 4 hours of real work until I feel sleepy. That's probably going to carry me for a couple days.

The flexibility is great its basically like being a full paid NEET if you have a minimum of willpower to actually strategically do work when absolutely needed. I actually get great ratings and raises every year

61965143
WFH healthcare Epic guy here. Have an offer to consult for big bucks, but it will require I leave my home periodically to travel. What do?

61965186
>>61965143
dinners with american boomers is the absolutely most painful part of my WFH job but it hasn't happened in over a year now. I'd say its worth it

61965203
>>61965186
Leaving a full time position for a short contract for the first time scares me, but when you're good (I am) the work keeps coming. Think im going for it.

61965295
Neet reporting in!
0 work per week!

61965410
>>61965110
Very comfy and based anon.

61965438
>>61958532
Are you me, lmao. I scroll through a lot of maps when I'm bored.

61965873
>>61954356
Holy comfy wtf
How much do you get paid and what's your job?

61965895
>>61958588
>>61959006
Kino, I have a mild secret sex fetish

61966734
>>61953855
>Let's all laugh at the wagies who..
Silly wagie, don't act like you're better than the rest of the cucks. If you're a wagie in any shape or form you are a lesser lifeform compared by default, to the NEET elite. Wagens truly say the darndest things.

61966978
>>61965203
Contract came in, no travel after all

61967069
>>61953855
Anyone else have a low 6 figure wfh job but hate it? Been at my place 4 years and worked my way up. Have a 2 year old and expecting another one. Not leaving it anytime soon but it’s starting to drain my soul. It’s comfy but has busy seasons and they blow. Anyone else feeling the golden cuffs?>>61953855

61967221
>>61959314
>Be careful
>When you are literally fulfilling your genetic perogative
No thanks, i will impregnate my wife on the clock as much as possible.

61967504
I work 2 jobs, one is full remote, but the other is 4 days in office, one from home. I've been actively looking to replace that one with a second full remote job.

61968042
>>61965895
>having penis in vagina sex with your wife is fetish material
Do zoomies really?

61968154
>>61954162
i just do the this when i'm not in the mood for work

61969091
>>61968042
It is if you're doing it in secret while on a call. Fetishes aren't always physical. I admit the lunch break one really isn't.

61969156
>>61969091
Just a variant of exhibitionism which, yes, I am into. Nothing like sex outdoors where you can get caught.

61969187
>>61969156
>exhibitionism
Fuck this is what I was trying to think of. Thanks

61969207
Goddamit I'm looking for a full WFM job, but it's really difficult these days, in my country the standard is 3 days in the office.

61969766
>>61968154
I guess your company must have non-existent monitoring software.

item.title: Certified Banger Money Farming — 28 replies — 49.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Certified Banger Money Farming

Open thread • Replies: 28 • Updated: 2026-03-11 18:36 UTC

OP

What are some methods, from which you have actually seen returns from, to make money outside of a day job
Side hustles, beer money, whatever you wanna call it, just name some good grinds out there that you could recommend to basically anyone
>Uhhhh just invest or hedge against some shitcoin
Not the point of the thread fuck off!
Mostly online methods preferred but not necessary (Yes I am aware some things take physical effort)
If it can be done both on a phone and PC even better
Personally I have been trying to form my own hustle for a little over a month now and have a subscriber base totaling $100 a month, not bad but nothing major

Early replies (first 3)

61952894
>>61952873
Indoor shrimp farming + Garloid wrangling

61952930
>>61952873
knee pads

61952932
>>61952930
overused joke

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61953415
Gold farming in osrs. elite void + scobo and you can start making bills.

61953746
>>61953415
big brained

61953781
>>61952894
>Indoor shrimp farming

61953950
>>61953781
this is goku on namek

61955477
>>61952873
Also looking for stuff

61955575
>>61952873
>>61955477

picrel

61955582
>>61955575
It ain’t a real video breh

61955605
>>61952873
Paid clinical trials are the ultimate truth nuke

61957064
>>61955605
What about plasma

61957251
>>61952873

You gave me false hope for Youtube with your thumbnail

61957258
>>61952873
pokemon investing

61957496
>>61957251
Sorry breh

61958438
>>61952932
But enough about your mom.

61960733
>>61958438
woah

61963077
>>61952873
.

61963084
>>61952873
i have a job, some people commit crimes, i think in general the richest people have a job they commit crime at in addition to side-hustle crimes on the side.

61963314
>>61952873
None of these will scam goycattle into making you millions, but here’s what I’ve done over the years:
>selling blood plasma
>reselling sealed trading cards
>working a second job
>scholarshipmaxxing
>setting up your primary job as a side hustle that bills more (I work in the financial sector, so I do personal finance and consulting on the side).

61963500
>>61963314
Plasma is the one I’m looking into most
What’s the time to revenue look like

61963549
>>61963500
If you’re sufficiently hydrated and protein-rich then it will take less than 90 minutes from start to finish, sometimes less. Revenue will differ greatly depending on whatever deals and promotions they have, but if you donate as often as you can (2x/week in the US) then you’re looking at $400-$500 per month. It’s not life changing money, but it’s not a bad return on your time if you need some extra cash.

61963646
>>61963314
Because I live in a communist country (France) you can't sell your plasma but only (((voluntarily))) donate it.
Fun thing is, France has a program to share (give) organs and blood to Israel since they never have enough (as if we had extra body parts laying around).

61967857
>>61952873
Getting a part time job?

61967865
Any of you guys do the ai consulting thing where you build AI chatbots for SMBs in middle america

61967888
scam boomers of their life-savings by pretending to be Microsoft support

61969899
>>61967888
You know
I don’t think I’ll do that

61970063
>>61952932
the truth never gets old

item.title: There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around — 55 replies — 22.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are now more tech workers going from the US to Europe than the other way around

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-03-11 16:43 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61952823
>>61952797
is this another one of those tricks where India becomes Southern Asian becomes Eastern Europe?

61952844
>>61952797
Ok, but why are both decreasing?

61952879
>>61952844
it looks to me that there are less Tech workers in general, the ones going back to Europe probably couldn't get a job in the US

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956865
Oh yea the other big deal in European tech is the desire to move away from U.S. based tech.
This will drive a huge boom in E.U. tech and coding jobs for 15+ years.
Americans really underestimate how petty and spiteful Europeans are. The people I work with don't even want to use U.S. clouds or Windows at all.

61956870
>>61956865
Any ways you can think to profit off of Linux? I feel it is finally reaching normal people, irregardless of Europeans

61956885
>>61952797
>Europoor cope.
Just ask an AI what the economic outlook is for the next 10 years for the US. Then for any Europoor country.

61956888
>>61956870
Learn linux.
Charge companies $$$ to install open source systems and maintain them.
Remember, you are charging them for the labor and not the software itself.

61956914
>>61956870
>>61956888
German government is again trying to switch their enterprise environments to Linux from MS.
So yea, but you need to speak German. But in general there is an uptick in E.U. demand for Linux experts...

61956916
>>61956885
>just ask the jewish USA produced chat bots what the jews programmed them to say
Nah. But they vary wildly week to week anyway. Grok is usually pro-USA but lately admits the only advantage to the USA is money at higher personal risk to crime and violence and imprisonment etc.

61956926
>>61956865
>oh hey we’re going to annex a huge territory belonging to an european nation while insulting in white house the leader of another european nation that is currently under threat of annexation in a war
>wtf why are they not trusting us anymore?? What spiteful creatures!

The mind of a burger is truly an interesting one.

61956941
>>61952901
europeans cant afford to save but do
americans cant afford to spend but do

61956988
>>61956926
You have to understand Amero-Jewish culture. It's not personal, it's just business. America's vicious jewish culture of fucking people over and jewing them out of their money and property doesn't allow for holding grudges.
Anyway, yea Europeans have diverged massively from Americans and that is the basic root of this schism and it is pathetic to watch Mexico Rubio come grovel to the Europeans and be like "hey guys we're still cool right? Our shared history and Christianity." Mesnwhile he's a spic from Cuba and 90% of Europeans are secular atheists.

61959430
>>61956988
Lol such a true post it ended the thread.

61959479
>>61956988
These fucking rural schizo yahoos like Vance coming here to lecture us boils my blood like nothing else

61959509
>>61956786
>he doesn't know...

61959529
>>61952797
Well, having nearly 10 weeks of comfy yearly paid leave does that

61959554
>>61956849
>the goal
Yeah that is the goal, but you didn't say it's the goal you said Europe is "unconquered" which is obviously not true, retard

61960952
>>61959479
That's your European elitism and snobbishness. In America white trash garbage like Vance can rise to such power that he can be richer and more powerful than any European even to the point your aristocratic old money elites have to listen to him call you bitch ass faggots to your faces.

61960963
>>61952797
Makes sense. Usa has no growth. Now Europe will have growth.

61961283
>>61959529
Coulda just been a teacher for all of those benefits

61961513
Local Europeans are delusional, hubris awaits them.

61965098
>>61952797
And all of them are Indians.

61965105
>>61956794
Australia

61968056
>>61960963
USA has seen immense growth this century while Europe stagnated. They tried to bring in Moslems but none of them have jobs so they contribute nothing to GDP and just get like $10,000 a month and free apartments to take care of their 3 wives and 17 kids.

61968099
>>61952823
eastern europe was never as shit as india

61968180
>>61956794
every continent besides asia got fucked in the ass by europe

61968241
>>61968099
Even in the worst days of the post Soviet collapse in the 1990s Eastern Europe was 100x better than India in terms of clean quality of life for normal people.
>>61968180
Asia got fucked plenty, read a history book ya dumb goon.

61968258
>>61968241
the "entire continent" fuck off and read the statement properly

61968284
>>61968056
The only reason why europe stagnated was because of Putin goinh retarded. None of this chud crap. Without Putin, retarded americans couldn’t compete with europe in any way.

61968329
>>61968284
this
it's all putler's fault

61968979
>>61968284
Yes yes. This evil evil Puuuuutin. We had to kill our economy to prevent him from uniting russia and little russia.

61969081
>>61952797
Fucking kek that /biz/jeets interpret this as a bad thing.

What part of "Fuck off, we're full" is hard for you turd worlders to understand? Let me know and I'll try to clear it up for you.

61969577
>>61952797
its europeans (actual white europeans) returning home because the job market is so bad, especially if you need sponsorship

item.title: how do I break out of poverty with no degree at age 34? — 43 replies — 18.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
how do I break out of poverty with no degree at age 34?

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-03-11 16:48 UTC

OP

how do I break out of poverty with no degree at age 34? I am very high IQ, got a perfect ACT and full ride to a good school, but fucked it all up getting addicted to drugs and Ive only just now finally stopped (1 year sober). So I have the ability to learn or do just about anything mental but I just dont fucking know where to start. My current dead end job waiting tables nets me about 45k a year and I have 15k in savings from the past year but I have no idea where to invest it or what to do with it, its just sitting there

please help out an absolute fucking retard

Early replies (first 3)

61968333
>>61968326
You're "very high IQ" right? You figure it out.

61968336
>>61968326
>So I have the ability to learn or do just about anything mental
you probably ruined your brain with drug abuse -- and you probably weren't all that smart to begin with, considering your retarded ass spent a decade relying on chemicals to make your niggerbrain feel good.

your first step will be losing this undeserved superiority complex.

61968337
>>61968333
thank you

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61968381
>>61968375
hey faggot im not the one endeavoring to start a degree at 34 and then beg someone like me for an internship when you're 36 fuckin years old. what were you even thinking for the LAST DECADE of your life?

61968397
>>61968381
you know my failed existence has nothing to do with the fact you're just not very bright, right big boy? Or is that concept too much for you? You won at life, just relax and enjoy sitting on top of the bell curve :)

61968411
>>61968397
if you're so smart then why did you need chemicals to feel good... for the past decade of your life?

61968426
>>61968411
Because big brainz are much more inclined to suffer from depression and can't handle being surrounded by cretins like yourself?
All the smarties i know went on drugs at one point or another of their lives, only lukewarm IQ npcs like thyself are happy without getting hooked on some chems.

61968427
>>61968426
Rick and morty type beat

61968434
>>61968364
Guess what, i earn six figures too in a high status profession. The fact that you talk about drugs ”ruining your brain” still reveals you as a midwit.

61968436
I mean, if the best thing you could say of yourself at 34 with no degree is
>I have high IQ
it looks grim ngl

Four roads:
1) Acceptance: you will not make it, you will survive doing menial jobs until you die, it doesn't need to be a lonely road you can start a family, when poor it's better to be in company. Families are strong safety nets for the poor. Maybe you luck out and you marry a well off goblina
2) The miser way. Save every single penny, invest correctly (your high IQ should help you there no?) Some redditors at personal finance did just that and made it. It requires some enormous mental to spend your youth in misery while your peers enjoy their life but it's doable
3) Find a job that requires for you to do almost nothing so you can actually do something productive with your time, like a second job or getting a degree or study for a better job
4) An hero

61968464
>>61968326
>ACT
>full ride to a good school
Not really sure LSU is considered a good school, but ok. On the plus side you have no student debt so you're most of the way there. NGL that fuckup with your full ride was a major oopsie. I went to college on a full ride myself (National Merit+fellowship) and going into life with a degree and no debt made it nearly impossible for me to fail at life.
>I have 15k in savings from the past year
That's not bad for 1 year's worth of savings. Open an account at Schwab or Fidelity (they may have a walk-in office near you, or you can do this from their websites) and put your savings into a Roth IRA and invest them into a S&P 500 fund. Every month or quarter plunk your spare savings into this fund. Or a brokerage fund if you exceed the Roth contribution limits (don't remember what they are, haven't been eligible in decades).

61968495
>>61968426
>doubling down on the 2smart4quittingdrugs

61968522
>>61968326

>high IQ
>still poor somehow

61968529
>>61968522
Idolizing money is also midwittery.

61968543
>>61968529
>christcuck moral compass
whoever filled your niggerbrain with this nonsense is wrong and deceitful. idolizing spending money is for morons. idolizing having money is not, because it allows for the rejection of wageslavery.

61968554
>>61968326
Stop being so arrogant and you might learn something

61968783
Get a degree in a good field for cheap. Use gubba to fund it. Then look for a job. Not complicated.

61968870
>>61968326
No one wants to hire a junkie OP. You will carry that weight for the rest of your life, we can see it in your face. Good luck with your restart though and grats on kicking the habit.

61968907
>>61968326
>very high IQ
>works for 45k/year

choose one

61969023
>>61968326
im in the same boat but 40
no friends or lover either, just watch all my money go to rent
i also think about suicide every day

61969071
>>61968326

61969094
>>61969023
I was the same way. Gnosticism, learning about the Monad and Archons and how to discipline your thoughts and be mindful, has helped me tremendously. You can simply ask Jesus to banish those thoughts or do it yourself with your own Sovereign Power and they will be gone.

61969186
>>61968326
>>61968337
>>61968351
>>61968360
>>61968375
>>61968397
34 old af but there are kinksters that will pay. also train stations and trucker bathrooms always an option.

your comeback arc will be magnificent. keep us posted bro.

61969192
>>61969094
god isnt real asshole

61969198
>>61969094
based and yaldabaothpilled

61969273
>>61969192
>t. unwilling carrier of divine spark getting farmed by the big D

61969286
>>61968333
FPBP

61969347
>>61968543
I came here to shit on drug addicts but I think you ended up being the bigger faggot here

61969353
>>61969347
suck my dick from the back, niggerbrain.

61969359
>>61969094
that's cool but don't blame the demiurge for your own retarded decisions in life, we're always blaming something/someone, call it fate, satan, demiurge, our parents; the Chinese even blame the disposition of their furniture for their bad luck, lol. Take some responsability for your actions and deal with the consequences. Archons have more important shit to do in the astral plane than giving you anxiety

61969536
honestly, just go back to being a drug addict at this point. its already over. job market is fucked and every house is a million dollars.

61969592
You guys are such doomer fags. OP can work till he’s 65. That’s almost 30 years of compounding.

61969604
>>61968351
Drugs screw your brain, you just downgraded your brain by 10-20 point or something but maybe your brain can take it
>>61968326
Some low level job related to economics...

item.title: WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS — 48 replies — 17.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS

Open thread • Replies: 48 • Updated: 2026-03-11 16:25 UTC

OP

WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS

Early replies (first 3)

61949419
>>61949388
You retard, that means the price of oil is gonna go…. You know what. Go ahead anon. You’re right. I hope you do short oil and gas

61949422
>>61949388
We are still early

61949435
>>61949388
Just bought oil

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949516
I put several grand into oil futures yesterday. Keep bombing all Persian Gulf production facilities pls.

61949589
>>61949440
ANTI-GRAVITATIONAL KNIFE

61949595
>>61949489
Gulf is 20% of world supply
Demand is highly inelastic

61949675
>>61949419
>Hello Europe, the price of oil has risen
>Hello Middle East, we definitely want the same amount of oil since we clearly have absurd amounts of money and aren't struggling at all

61949825
Trump will set pump prices. No more increases. Prices will fall soon.

61949895
This but unironically, the puts are dirt cheap, the otherside of the trade is filled with retards. It just takes one tweet

61949935
>>61949825
I think they will try this. Bessent said they’re going to announce measures Thursday that’ll possibly include shorting the futures.

61950453
OIL BROS, WHAT KIND OF BARRELS DO I BUY?!?!

61950522
>>61949895
This. Otm puts on everything was and somehow still is a bargain

61950803
>>61949388
Im underinvested in wti

61950809
>>61949437
Yeah that worked out real well this time lol. I told everyone I could to pay attention to Trump’s actions and not his words before he got back in office. His policy is to confuse and befuddle his opponents both domestic and abroad so they can’t stonewall him like they used to. Worked out great compared to that dumpster fire of a first term but for some reason a lot of people on the right liked the neocons, never ending migrant caravans and Russia investigations.

61953557
>>61949504

61957678
>>61949440
They're called rising knives you financially illiterate retard.

61957688
>>61949438
>>61949388
https://oilprice.com/oil-price-charts/

Don't short oil , it may go to 120-150.

61957789
>>61949675
So your saying europe will buy less oil meaning demand is lower? Msm has been putting out fud and people are panic buying though

61957863
>>61957789
>Msm has been putting out fud and people are panic buying though
I'm talking about effects which take longer than a week to materialize. If this war takes longer than the US initially expected which is fairly likely since they actually thought the Iranians would prefer the US over their religious leader Europe's economy will suffer so massively that the demand will lower.

61961889
>>61949388
Fuck, this guy turned out to be right. I mean it doesn’t matter to me too much since I didn’t hold a position either way, but still. Are you a reverse Crammer god or just so retarded that Lady Luck feels bad for you?

61961896
oh, so it makes sense /biz/ were the ones longing oil at the pico top lol

I was wondering what kind of retarded faggot would make that trade

61962097
>>61949489
The trick is to gauge the top and short it. My guess is oil tops at like $180-190 a barrel.

61962108
Just make a shortcut through Oman!

61962114
>>61949388
I would stay out of it entirely. You have to be clinically retarded to try to bet on something as volatile as this, especially when Trump and his gang of Saudis and Jews can game things however they want to profit off the situation. The Saudis can make the line go up and down on a whim.

61962117
>>61962114
So can Iran too at the moment if they continue to be bomb-happy, I might add.

61966804
>>61962114
This is unironically the best take. Commoditity markets are manipulated—oil especially so and even more so during volatile periods.

61966816
>>61962114
Very true as all have a vested interested in not letting it get out of control, but iran has now just as much if not more influence in determining these prices and they have noticed us squirming they may not even relent if trump declared victory

61966829
>>61962097
Trump is starting to let Putin poomp again to fund his war against Ukr-I mean to tamp down energy prices.

61966876
>>61966829
38% of their refining capacity has been degraded by Ukraine, unless the EU and US stop them they aren't going to be able to step in nearly as much as they should (also their tanker fleet is in ruins)

61969423
>>61949388
Uh, OP? This isn't aging well

61969439
>>61949441
femboy oil

61969456
>>61949419
extremely low IQ post, enjoy being exit liquidity

61969489
>>61962114
>Bets on crypto
>But wont bet on oil because its volatile
